parameters.apprise_url_plus: burstsms://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.sender_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Burst SMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise burstsms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Burst SMS send-sms.json form body and post it to api.transmitsms.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: to=${ customer_secrets.BURSTSMS_SMS_TO }&from=${ customer_secrets.BURSTSMS_SMS_FROM }&message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Burst SMS account (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Burst SMS destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Burst SMS apikey

secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Burst SMS secret

sender_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Burst SMS sender id

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Burst SMS targets
